metric_definitions.activation_share: activation_weight normalised to sum 1 across the concept's roots
metric_definitions.corpus_token_count: total token occurrences of the root in the whole corpus (Phase-1 roots.token_count)
metric_definitions.in_concept_ayah_count: distinct concept-activating ayahs containing the root
metric_definitions.in_concept_token_count: root tokens occurring inside ayahs that activate this concept
metric_definitions.neighborhood_influence: summed Phase-2 semantic-neighbour confidence from the root to its concept co-member roots
metric_definitions.stability_contribution: Phase-3 membership_confidence (fraction of perturbation runs the root stayed in the concept)
